children.value:
import numpy as np

# Major & minor radii
R = 4
r = 1.78
# Stitch dimensions
w = .4
h = .4
# Row count
N = round(r*np.pi/h)
# Stitch count
st_count = [0]*(N+1)
row = [0]*(N+1)
for n in range(N+1):
    theta = n*np.pi/N
    st_count[n] = str(round(2*np.pi*(R-r*np.cos(theta))/w))
    row[n] = n #"Row "+str(n)+": "+str(st_count[n])+" st."

children.value: and join into round. 1 st into each chain sp around.
Work the following stitch counts in subsequent rows. Increases made using 2 st in st of previous row. Try to evenly distribute increases for a symmetrical look.

from tabulate import tabulate
import numpy as np

table = np.transpose([row, st_count])
pattern = tabulate(table,headers=["Row","Stitch count"],tablefmt="html")
display(pattern)

rθ=(rsin⁡θcos⁡ϕ,rsin⁡θsin⁡ϕ,rcos⁡θ),rϕ=(−(R−rcos⁡θ)sin⁡ϕ,(R−rcos⁡θ)cos⁡ϕ,0),rθθ=(rcos⁡θcos⁡ϕ,rcos⁡θsin⁡ϕ,−rsin⁡θ),rθϕ=(−rsin⁡θsin⁡ϕ,rsin⁡θcos⁡ϕ,0), and rϕϕ=(−(R−rcos⁡θ)cos⁡ϕ,−(R−rcos⁡θ)sin⁡ϕ,0).\begin{gather*} \mathbf{r}_\theta=\left(r\sin\theta\cos\phi,r\sin\theta\sin\phi,r\cos\theta\right), \\ \mathbf{r}_\phi=\left(-(R-r\cos\theta)\sin\phi,(R-r\cos\theta)\cos\phi,0\right), \\ \mathbf{r}_{\theta\theta}=\left(r\cos\theta\cos\phi,r\cos\theta\sin\phi,-r\sin\theta\right),\\ \mathbf{r}_{\theta\phi}=\left(-r\sin\theta\sin\phi,r\sin\theta\cos\phi,0\right), \text{ and }\\ \mathbf{r}_{\phi\phi}=\left(-(R-r\cos\theta)\cos\phi,-(R-r\cos\theta)\sin\phi,0\right). \end{gather*}rθ​=(rsinθcosϕ,rsinθsinϕ,rcosθ),rϕ​=(−(R−rcosθ)sinϕ,(R−rcosθ)cosϕ,0),rθθ​=(rcosθcosϕ,rcosθsinϕ,−rsinθ),rθϕ​=(−rsinθsinϕ,rsinθcosϕ,0), and rϕϕ​=(−(R−rcosθ)cosϕ,−(R−rcosθ)sinϕ,0).​
